--tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px 0px 1.25em;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">To work through story structure as taught by K.M. Weiland, let's break down the essential components and see how your scene aligns with them for White Noise:</span></p></li><li style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px;"><span style="font-family: georgia;"><span style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600;">Hook</span>: Your opening scene successfully grabs attention with the mysterious behavior of the two men and the protagonist's reaction. The blend of reality and hallucination creates a strong hook.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; margin-top: 0px; min-height: 28px; padding-left: 0.375em;"><p style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px;"><span style="font-family: georgia;"><span style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600; white-space: pre-wrap;">Inciting Incident</span><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;">: This is typically an event that disrupts the protagonist's world and sets the story in motion. This may not be directly related to the First Plot Point, but it should hint at it </span><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;">thematically or give some kind of foreshadowing or hint about the nature of the first plot point</span><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;">. </span></span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul></ul></li><li style="font-family: Söhne, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Roboto, Ubuntu, Cantarell, &quot;Noto Sans&quot;, sans-serif, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, Arial, &quot;Apple Color Emoji&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI Emoji&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI Symbol&quot;, &quot;Noto Color Emoji&quot;; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600;">First Plot Point</span>: This is where the story takes a decisive turn and the protagonist is pushed into the main conflict.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;"><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul></ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;"><br /></span></li><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; counter-reset: list-number 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; list-style: none; margin: 1.25em 0px; padding: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><li style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: georgia; font-weight: 600;">First Half of the Second Act 1st Pinch Point</span><span style="font-family: georgia;">: This usually involves the protagonist reacting to the new situation.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600;">Midpoint</span>: Here, there's usually a significant development or revelation. Your story hasn't reached this point yet, but you might want to think about how Ash's understanding of his hallucinations or the reality of his situation could evolve.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600;">Second Half of the Second Act - 2nd Pinch Point</span>: The protagonist moves from reaction to action. Ash will likely start to take more deliberate steps regarding his PTSD, the hallucinations, or the mysterious events unfolding in the town.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px;"><span style="font-family: georgia;"><span style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 600;">Third Plot Point</span>: A low point for the protagonist. Given the psychological and possibly supernatural elements in your story, this could involve a significant challenge or setback for Ash.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; counter-reset: list-number 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; list-style: none; margin: 1.25em 0px; padding: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><li style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; counter-increment: list-number 1; display: block; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; min-height: 28px; padding-left: 0.375em;"><p style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px;"><span style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; font-family: georgia; font-weight: 600;">Climax</span><span style="font-family: georgia;">: The protagonist confronts the main conflict. This would be the culmination of Ash's struggles with his PTSD, the hallucinations, and any external conflicts introduced.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; white-space: pre-wrap;"></li></ol></ul><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-family: georgia;"><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><b><br /></b></span></span></div><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><span style="font-family: georgia;"><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><b>Climactic Moment:</b> The single moment the story has build toward.</span></span></div><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><ul><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; Ash's journey would reach a satisfying end, whether it's coming to terms with his condition, uncovering a larger mystery, or something else.</span></p></li></ol><ul style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><li><span style="white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-family: georgia;">Action:</span></span></li><ul><li><span style="font-family: georgia;">Reaction:</span></li></ul><ol style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; counter-reset: list-number 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; list-style: none; margin: 1.25em 0px; padding: 0px;"><li style="--tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-ring-color: rgba(69,89,164,0.5); --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 transparent; --tw-shadow: 0 0 transparent; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; border: 0px solid rgb(217, 217, 227); box-sizing: border-box; counter-increment: list-number 1; display: block; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; min-height: 28px; padding-left: 0.375em; white-space: pre-wrap;"></li></ol></ul><p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; white-space: normal;"><br /></p></ol>
